kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - The Halemaʻumaʻu eruption of Kīlauea remains paused. Spatter was visible within the north vent overnight. Summit inflation continues. The forecast window for the onset of episode 48 fountains is between today and Monday (May 30-June 1).

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
